name: Client Operating Model Phase 9 Build Portable Cartridge
outcome_goal: Implement portable cartridge manifest and deployment contract validation: assets, bindings, Object Truth dependencies, verifier suite, compatibility, drift hooks, and tests.
anti_requirements: Do not stage or commit git changes.
Do not build a new orchestration engine.
Do not allow cartridges to execute without full contract validation.
Do not rely on hidden environment state.
Do not regenerate shared docs/API.md, docs/CLI.md, or docs/MCP.md in this parallel chain; Phase 11 owns final shared surface docs.

jobs.label: phase_09_portable_cartridge_build
jobs.prompt: Build Phase 9 from artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_09_portable_cartridge/PLAN.md. Implement bounded portable cartridge primitives: canonical manifest model, asset/binding records, Object Truth dependency classes and resolution order, compatibility/runtime assumptions, verifier suite contract, digest/signature placeholders where existing patterns support them, drift hook references, and validation output. Do not implement a new runtime host. Add tests for valid manifest, missing required truth dependency, stale dependency fail_closed, invalid binding, digest mismatch, and verifier requirement handling. Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/build_reports/phase_09_IMPLEMENTATION.md with changed files, validation, blockers, and Phase 11 surface needs. Do not stage or commit.
